# Page with Wiki Links

This page contains several types of links:

- Standard markdown link: [External Link](https://example.com)
- Wiki-style link: [[Physics and Spirituality]]
- Wiki-style link with display text: [[Complex Page|Complex]]
- Another wiki link: [[The Veils Ignorance]]

The wiki links should be processed as internal path links for navigation.
